hero.headline: Your Seat at The Table Starts Here
hero.subhead: The marketplace where Asian restaurant owners sell to vetted SBA, EB-5, and search-fund buyers — no upfront fees, ever.

items.title: Bilingual Listing
items.body: List in 10 minutes from any device. Native support for Mandarin, Korean, and Vietnamese. Invisible to English-only competitors.

items.title: Market Data
items.body: Valuations backed by 50+ SBA and US Census Bureau data sources — because every number means something.

items.title: Vetted Demand
items.body: Buyers must show proof of funds or SBA pre-qualification before seller contacts are released. Vetted by our advisors. Zero spam.

items.title: Curated Resources
items.body: Expert guides, bilingual templates, and case studies curated by advisors who have been in your seat.

pricing.lineThree: We charge when we deliver a closed deal —
pricing.lineFour: because if we don't, why should you pay?
